fields.label: Triggered By

manual
manual_button
system

fields.description: manual_button = TOC Settings 'Run Now' (Projection). cron = 02:00 AM daily Projection scheduler. so_shortage_manual = TOC Settings 'Run Sales Order Shortage Now' button. so_shortage_cron = scheduled SO-shortage runner. shortage_action_manual = TOC Settings 'Run Shortage Action Now' button. shortage_action_cron = scheduled Shortage Action runner (opt-in via hooks.py).

fields.label: SO Statuses Treated as Pending
fields.description: Snapshot of TOC Settings 'Pending Sales Order Statuses' at run time. Pinned for audit reproducibility.

fields.label: Default SO Warehouse Used
fields.description: Snapshot of TOC Settings 'Default Warehouse for Sales Orders' applied to SOs with blank warehouse.

fields.label: Calc A Created
fields.description: Number of items where Calc A (forecast) created a Production Plan.

fields.label: Calc A Skipped
fields.description: Number of items where Calc A returned a non-Created status.

fields.label: Calc B Created
fields.description: Number of items where Calc B (SO-driven) created a Production Plan.

fields.label: Calc B Skipped
fields.description: Number of items where Calc B returned a non-Created status.

fields.label: Errors
fields.description: Number of items where the engine raised an exception.

fields.label: Item Decisions
fields.description: One row per (item × warehouse × calc). For each item, you'll typically see two rows: one for Calc A and one for Calc B.

fields.label: Engine Log
fields.description: Free-form text dumped by the engine — exceptions, traceback excerpts, configuration warnings.
